title: Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-12
content:
# Today Execution Pack — 2026-03-12

## Focus for Today
Revenue-first Vancouver real estate execution:
1) warm lead pipeline movement (buyer/seller)
2) sphere referral activation
3) one consumer-facing local authority post
4) COI outreach with coffee conversion
5) light recruiting follow-up maintenance only

## 1) Warm Lead Follow-up Block (12)

**Message A (status + urgency):**
"Hey [Name] — quick Vancouver market check-in: are you still targeting a move in the next 3–6 months, or has your timeline changed? I can send a 60-second update for your exact area."

**Message B (booking CTA):**
"If helpful, let’s do a 10-minute strategy call so you have a clean next step before the weekend. I can do [Option 1] or [Option 2]."

## 2) Past-Client Sphere Check-in Block (6)

"Hey [Name] — hope you’re doing well. Quick favor: if anyone in your circle is thinking about buying/selling in Vancouver this year, I’m happy to help with a no-pressure plan. I can also send a quick neighborhood value snapshot if useful."

## 3) Consumer-Facing Post (publish today)

**Hook:** "Vancouver sellers in 2026: your first week on market decides your leverage."

**Post draft:**
"If you’re selling in Vancouver this season, focus on these 3 things first:\n\n1) Price to create early competition, not late reductions\n2) Prep photos + showing flow before going live\n3) Pre-negotiate your strategy so you control terms, not just price\n\nComment ‘SELLER’ and I’ll send my pre-listing launch checklist."

## 4) COI Outreach Block (3 intros, 1 coffee ask)

"Hey [Name] — I’m tightening my Vancouver referral network across mortgage, legal, and inspection so clients get faster support. Open to a quick coffee next week to compare what buyers/sellers are struggling with in 2026?"

## 5) Recruiting Maintenance (15-minute cap)

Send 2 warm recruiting follow-ups max using existing script. No new recruiting campaign work today.

## End-of-Day Scorecard Targets
- Warm follow-ups sent: 12
- Past-client check-ins sent: 6
- Consumer posts published: 1
- COI intros sent: 3
- Coffee chats booked: 1
- Recruiting follow-ups sent: 2 (cap)
- Replies received: target 6+
- Calls booked: target 2+
- Consults booked: target 1+
